spec_match.rationale: Highly realistic toolbar demonstration using modern CSS Anchor Positioning contracts and clean fallback overrides.

interactive.rationale: Excellent hover/focus state captures, live event logs, and visual state-bar dots updating active popover counts.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Corresponds nicely to parent toolbar concept metadata.

edge_cases.rationale: Stellar handling: features CSS anchor fallback triggers manually calculating positions on toggle events if anchor-name is unsupported.

references.rationale: Properly lists the tracking ChromeStatus entry under references.

design_system.rationale: Stunning presentation utilizing simple light borders, colored indicator dots, and monospace status logs.
